attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

codes_manifest.display: Acute arterial occlusion / critical limb ischaemia

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-VASC-03-00018 — SEQ derived from source CDV-018; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-VASC-03 bucket.
Age not stated in the source note — inferred as ~62 (older_adult) from the full lipid-stigmata tetrad, established atherosclerosis and 'avoided doctors for years'. Please confirm on clinician review.
Sex not stated in the source note — inferred as male for demographics.sex_at_birth (required field). Please confirm on clinician review.
Specialty tagged VASC (with CARD) — the source filename labels it hyperlipidaemia but the presentation is symptomatic peripheral arterial disease; reviewer may reclassify.

Difficulty tier set red_herring_laden — benign chronic label (hyperlipidaemia) masking an important-not-to-miss vascular presentation with DVT / neurogenic-claudication / acute-limb-ischaemia distractors.

Telehealth reprojection applied: clinician-only findings (weak femoral + absent distal pulses, carotid bruits, Achilles tendon xanthomas, BP 140/90) and investigations (ABI, fasting lipids, HbA1c, 12-lead ECG) sealed into 10/11 with telehealth_limits; video-observable stigmata (xanthelasma, corneal arcus) and self-reported weight/limb appearance surfaced in 01.objective_data_offered (verified:false).

Baseline tier set T3 (urgent same-day in-person assessment), NOT the source's routine 3-day GP review: telehealth cannot palpate pulses or perform an ABI to exclude acute limb ischaemia in an acutely worsening presentation. Source clinician's after-hours urgency is preserved; the 3-day statin/lipid review is retained as the subsequent step.

No statin dose stated — source note specifies 'high-intensity statin' without a dose; dose omitted per no-invented-dose rule, to be set at in-person review against the fasting lipid result. Aspirin 100 mg once daily is taken verbatim from the source note.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
